вЂє Damien was totally hammered on your birthday. The more he drank, the clingier he got.

в”Ѓ в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ в”Ѓ

вЂЋ SYNOPSISвЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ

Damien had started the night with full confidence that he would stay cool, and most importantly, sober. After all, it was your birthday, and if anyone deserved to be the center of attention, it was you, not him.

But as the night wore on, that plan quickly went up in flamesвЂ”much like everything else Damien touched. He normally wasn't the type to go around hanging off people, and he definitely wasn't the type to get all mushy.

At least, not when he was sober.

But sober Damien wasn't here right now; instead, you got this very drunk and smitten demon boyfriend, who, for all his bluster and bravado, couldn't quite hide how much you meant to him.

в”Ѓ в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ в”Ѓ
